name: Irish Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1 Combine the bay leaf, water, and wine vinegar in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil.
2 Add the vegetables and simmer until they are tender. If necessary, drain and remove the bay leaf.
3 Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Food Exchange: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE (IN THE BOOK, IT SAID 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE)
Calories: 51
The Complete Diabetic Cookbook by Mary Jane Finsand
